title: 202  Why research is on even after Lord Krishna declaring here is God
speaker: HH Stoka Krishna Maharaj

segments.text: Under standard model of physics, this particle which was named after British physicist Peter
Higgs and is sometime known as the God particle, is posited to have been the agent that gave
mass and energy to matter just after the big bang 13.7 billion years ago.
So they are saying that this elusive particle which they are not able to find out actually
is the particle which gave mass to matter after the big bang 13.7 billion years ago.
So they are saying either it does not exist or it is hiding somewhere.
For some scientists, the Higgs remains the simplest explanation of how matter got mass.
It remains unclear what could replace it as an explanation.
So they don't have an explanation.
This is the possible explanation.
There was a big bang and this whole universe came into being.
What could else be the possible explanation?
We know something is missing.
We simply don't know what is the new something might be.
We know something is missing in our understanding but we don't know what that something is.
So, what is it?
I have written this in the book, written a certain blogger by name Pauline Ganon.
So after so much of research, ultimately, something is missing.
What that something is, we don't know.
There is an elusive particle.
It is running away.
We are not able to catch hold of it.
So here because of that desire to know independent of Krishna, lot of fine it is fine, we need
to know.
Fine, we need to know, we can do experiments, but then so much of human life, which is so, Bhagavatam says, labdwas durlamam, is meant for a purpose, it is getting wasted.
Another article, how some theory is proposed and then another set of scientists come and say that, no, it is not true.
Scientists may have uncovered evidence that the universe existed before the Big Bang.
Now, here, in the earlier articles, most of the scientists believe that the universe came into being by Big Bang.
Concentric circles discovered in Cosmic Microwave Background Radiation, CMB, Cosmic Microwave Background Radiation,
the after effects of the Big Bang display evidence of events that took place before most scientists believe the universe came.
So, that means we are groping in darkness.
So, in contrast to that, we have a Vedic knowledge, just another few days back, we saw an article was put up,
that scientists now claim that out of 88 lakh species, they have just found, or they have come to know of 1.2 lakh, 1 point, 1 point?
9 lakh species, or 1 million species.
So, this 88 lakh we were discussing, it is very close to what Bhagavatam is saying.
8.4 million, 84 lakh species.
So, in other words, we are so fortunate that the truth which is elusive, is eluding scientists,
is eluding scientists.
know the truth. They are theologians who are researching on God. Prabhupada once said,
if I show you God, if I tell you that here is God, will you stop your research?
The next question to be asked is, if this is the truth, how I can serve the truth?
But the research is on. Even though Krishna is there, God himself has come
and declared, but somehow because of that rebellious attitude, desire to not accept
Krishna, not surrender Krishna, to find, to know things minus Krishna, because of that
attitude, they are somehow going in circles.
